author: xuhuaya0
description: Show and classify Markdown plans by Eisenhower quadrants. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: xuhuaya0
manifest.description: Show and classify Markdown plans by Eisenhower quadrants.
manifest.name: Plan Panel

name: Plan Panel

releases.author: xuhuaya0
releases.description:
Initial public release of Plan Panel.

- Today task list
- Eisenhower-style quadrants
- Drag and drop ordering
- Start and completion time tags
- Supports `- [ ]`, `* [ ]`, and `1. [ ]` tasks
